title: bromus lepidus var. micromollis
intro: Bromus lepidus var. micromollis, also known as the Mountain Brome or Little Prairie Brome, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues and as an anti-inflammatory. The health benefits of Bromus lepidus var. micromollis include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, making it a popular choice for natural remedies and holistic health practices.
